content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt explicitly calls this a "public beta" and says "expect rough edges" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt:1-2), which is store-facing beta language.
Pierre: Apple requires App Store submissions to be finished, non-beta products — beta distribution belongs on TestFlight only. This release note tells reviewers and users the app is unfinished and buggy, which invites a 2.2/2.1 rejection or at least review questions. Rewrite the release notes to describe finished, shipped functionality (e.g. "New: faster sync"), removing "beta", "testing", and "rough edges" language.
